creator: sheldonh@uunet.co.za
text:
On Fri, 17 Mar 2000 11:15:26 PST, larse@isi.edu wrote:

> >Description:
> I recorded a CD-R without fixating it, than tried to mount it by accident,
> and the machine paniced.  I still have the disk, let me know if I should
> gather more information (what and how?)

The lack of information provided makes it difficult to figure out who
should look at this.  Could show us your dmesg output and tell us which
device you used to mount the CD-R?

Ciao,
Sheldon.
